T001.result_summary: Added ServiceInfo and ServiceList types to types.go with JSON tags matching command schema contract

T002.result_summary: Created list.go with ListServices (kubectl exec discovery), RenderTable (tabwriter), RenderJSON functions

T003.result_summary: Wired --list flag into main.go: added flag parsing, mutual exclusion with positional arg (exit 5), dispatch to ListServices/RenderTable/RenderJSON, cluster unreachable handling (exit 6)

T004.result_summary: Wrote list_test.go with 7 tests covering RenderTable (empty, single, sorted, Not Ready, Unknown) and RenderJSON (empty, populated, JSON tags)

T005.result_summary: Build succeeds, go vet clean, --help shows --list flag, --list with positional arg exits 5, --list --json outputs valid JSON, --list --namespace works
